'''Brolis''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] after the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and was one of the few survivors in the disastrous [[Battle of Axion]].

==Biography==
Created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="db" /> Brolis was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]]<ref name="TNEC" /> who served the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During his service, Brolis participated in a [[Battle of Axion|battle]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the battle, Commander Brolis managed to lead his forces into penetrating the [[Fortress of Axion]], but they were eventually overwhelmed by Separatist forces. Brolis and his last two squads fled into the city where they took refuge in one of the ruined buildings. Brolis requested reinforcements, but as the group waited they were eventually whittled down by [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] forces until only Brolis remained. Commander Brolis continued to hold out in the building, knowing the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] wanted him alive so they could learn how they were able to infiltrate the Fortress of Axion. Tired, Brolis took an uneasy nap which he awoke from when his proximity alarm buzzed, alerting him of the approaching battle droids.<ref name="Duel" />

Commander Brolis took aim at the first battle droid he spotted but was startled after being told to put the weapon away by an unknown voice. Turning around, Brolis took sight of a diminutive, green creature who told Brolis that he was the requested reinforcements. As the short individual ignited his [[Yoda's lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Commander Brolis realized that he was [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. Brolis watched as Yoda defeated the droids by deflecting their blaster bolts without ever moving from his spot. Shortly after, a [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|hailfire droid]] arrived and shot a missile directly at Yoda. Master Yoda leaped out of the way of the missile, causing it to explode harmlessly behind him, to which the droid shot three more missiles at him. After Yoda avoided the salvo of missiles, Brolis heard calibration clicks coming from the hailfire droid. Brolis relayed to Yoda that it was a tracking lock just before the droid shot another missile. Spinning in the air, Yoda was able to confuse the missile's tracking, causing it to miss. Brolis continued to watch as the droid charged forward and sent a barrage of missiles that were evaded by Master Yoda.<ref name="Duel" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Brolis appeared in "[[Duel (short story)|Duel]]," a short story written by [[Timothy Zahn]] for the [[Star Wars: Short Story Collection]], released in [[August]] [[2003]].<ref name="Duel" /> Released [[October 25]], [[2005]],<ref name="CargoBay">{{RandomHouseOld|url=author/results.pperl?authorid=32326|text=Daniel Wallace}}</ref> ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that Brolis is an outside military advisor hired by the Kaminoans to train the clones into fighting shape.<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Both ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' released on [[December 9]], [[2008]],<ref name="Penguin-TCSWE">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/160596/the-complete-star-wars-encyclopedia-by-stephen-j-sansweet-pablo-hidalgo-bob-vitas-daniel-wallace/9780345477637|text=The Complete Star Wars® Encyclopedia}}</ref> and ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' released on [[October 2]], [[2012]]<ref name="Penguin-TERC">{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/7825/the-essential-readers-companion-star-wars-by-pablo-hidalgo/9780345511195|text=The Essential Reader's Companion: Star Wars}}</ref> contradict this by establishing that Brolis is a Clone Commander. Since these two most recent sources identify Brolis as a clone commander, this article assumes that to be Brolis' relation to the Galactic Republic.<ref name="TERC" /><ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|94|Brolis, Clone Commander}}</ref> This assumption aligns with the short story's title image, which depicts Yoda with a clone trooper.<ref name="Duel" />
